concerns.text: Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) is marked PASS, but the plan lacks a specific mechanism to enforce the 'Title-token-overlap ≥ 0.7' rule or the 'Reference-Validator Agent' gate described in the constitution. The plan mentions 'validated against the Verified datasets block' but does not explicitly commit to the automated validation logic required by Principle II, creating a potential violation of the constitutional gate.

Constitution Principle VI (Time-Series Integrity) is marked PASS, yet the plan does not explicitly state that the 'lag adjustments applied' during alignment will be recorded in the `data/` artifacts as required by the principle ('explicitly recorded in data/'). The plan mentions 'documentation of lag/alignment adjustments' in the notebook, but the constitution requires this to be in the data artifacts themselves to ensure traceability.

The plan references 'contracts/*' in the Project Structure section but does not list the specific contract files (e.g., `aligned_timeseries.schema.yaml`) that will be generated or used. While the contracts exist in the input, the plan should explicitly reference them to ensure the 'Plan ↔ contracts' consistency check is satisfied (every contract has a plan element that exercises it).
